title: GitHub Copilot is moving to usage-based billing
content: GitHub Copilot will shift to usage‑based billing on June 1 2026. All plans will receive a monthly allotment of GitHub AI Credits, calculated by token consumption, and can buy more if needed. Base prices remain unchanged: Pro $10/month, Pro+ $39/month, Business $19/user/month, Enterprise $39/user/month. Code completions stay free of credits; other features use credits. A preview billing tool will launch in May to help users anticipate costs.

content: The United States has imposed sanctions on Chinese refinery operations, extending a broader policy of punitive measures against China's energy sector. The action is intended to pressure China amid escalating tensions with the United States over political and economic disputes. By targeting key refineries, the sanctions aim to disrupt supply chains and influence China's position in the ongoing geopolitical standoff. This move underscores the U.S. strategy of leveraging industrial control to counter Chinese influence and secure compliance with its foreign‑policy objectives.

title: 不同 AI 平台的历史记录聚合，有什么好方法吗

They occasionally need to retrieve a past query but cannot remember which platform housed it, and some services even lack search functions. The question asks whether there is a way to aggregate the chat logs from all AI websites into a single, accessible location. Although third‑party clients with APIs could unify access, this would incur costs and is considered unnecessary.

title: 全球本地部署开发者们一起，打造一个真正属于开源社区的 Coding Agent 了
content: A community-driven project aims to build a truly open-source Coding Agent that runs locally on 8 B models, bypassing costly API services. It tackles issues like limited context, unreliable network, and ineffective tool use by employing a lightweight LLM gate and deterministic expert modules (MOE). Key features include BM25 + AST-based file locating, prompt‑sized patching, automated verification with local or Bing/duckduckgo search, and a self‑learning expert system that adapts to repeated tasks. The open-source code invites contributions, enabling developers to share custom experts and improve the agent without large‑model APIs.

title: 最强大模型，保质期越来越短了
content: The article explains why the “best” AI model’s dominance is shortening—from yearly to a few weeks. Rapid model iterations, multiple product updates, and tighter data‑center power limits now require companies to integrate models into real‑world scenarios quickly. Firms like Google, OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, and Tencent rebuild infrastructure, launch agents, and focus on niche strengths (e.g., coding) to maintain short‑term advantage. The industry shifts from one‑off tech leads to continuous delivery and ecosystem depth, making sustained leadership harder.

The “Mystery Team” bought stocks to support the market during a liquidity crisis, injecting capital through ETFs and altering fund‑chip ratios that lifted prices. Their actions only made sense when the market failed; they could not stay in a distorted market. Their subsequent sales aimed to restore normal market functioning, not to crash prices. Like removing a catheter after surgery, they withdrew once liquidity returned, so the sell‑off was an inevitable, not manipulative, step.

title: Spring Shell 4.0.2 发布
content:

title: “00后人均摆块姜”，年轻人找到最便宜的职场邪修
content: In Chinese workplaces, young professionals decorate desks with plant arrangements and feng‑shui items to boost luck and calm stress. A trendy practice is growing “福禄根” (ginger) for its symbolism of wealth and career growth, alongside other oddities like loach fish. These rituals, supported by “feng‑shui stylists” and personal equipment, offer a sense of control amid uncertain job markets, even though their actual efficacy remains unverified. The trend reflects a broader desire for psychological comfort in modern office life.

title: AI智力天花板崩了，GPT-5.5 Pro视觉智商145，撞倒门萨俱乐部门槛
content: OpenAI’s GPT‑5.5 Pro has scored 130 on text IQ tests and 145 on visual IQ tests, surpassing the Mensa Z‑score threshold of 130 and entering the top 0.1 percent of global intelligence. The visual score, measured on a non‑linguistic 3×3 grid, indicates superior pattern recognition. This marks the first non‑human entry into Mensa and demonstrates accelerated gains in AI reasoning, token efficiency, and multimodal capabilities.

title: 只需 10 分钟，AI 就能「养废」你的大脑
content: Studies across maths, reading, and prior research show that short periods of AI assistance lower later independent performance and increase dropout rates. Participants who received full answers via AI performed worse and gave up more than those who used AI for hints or not at all. The research argues that overreliance erodes problem‑solving persistence and self‑assessment, creating a “cognitive debt.” It recommends designing AI as a guiding tutor rather than a do‑everything helper to preserve human learning resilience.

title: 人工智能热潮盖过了战争担忧，加剧了亚洲市场的巨大分化
content: AI excitement has eclipsed concerns about conflict, deepening the stark differences across Asian markets. Consumer demand and corporate investment in AI technologies are rising rapidly, especially in China and India, while market valuations and access to capital vary widely. This creates a pronounced split: regions heavily engaged in AI adoption experience significant growth, whereas others lag, widening the gap between high-performing and slower-growth economies within the continent.

title: 时薪 15 美元的新工种：把 iPhone 绑在脑门上，替 AI 蒸馏自己
content: A new gig pays $15 per hour for workers who film themselves doing household tasks while wearing a camera‑mounted iPhone. Companies like Micro1, Scale AI, and DoorDash collect this video to train humanoid robots, requiring workers to submit hours of footage that must meet strict quality and privacy standards. They pay a base rate, but many videos are rejected, wasting labor. The practice turns everyday physical knowledge—such as folding laundry—into data that powers the projected billions‑dollar humanoid robot market.

Sunday saw four Oriental Selection hosts quit, highlighting conflict between platform and personal IP. Unlike traditional brands where customers think of the company, livestreaming audiences follow individual hosts. The departure signals a shift from MCN celebrity‑centric model to a standardized retail platform. Oriental’s strategy now emphasizes self‑sourced, supply‑chain‑driven sales rather than story‑telling by star hosts. This move reduces reliance on single personalities, aiming for scalable, repeatable operations, even if it forces popular hosts to leave.

title: 伊朗递交停战条件，并提出一项分三阶段解决的谈判方案，与此前内容有哪些变化？美方接受可能性有多大？
content: Iran’s foreign minister, Abbas Araghzani, visited Pakistan after Oman and before Russia, delivering to Pakistan a truce proposal and a three‑stage negotiation framework through intermediaries. The first stage seeks a complete end to the war with assurances against renewed attacks on Iran and Lebanon. If achieved, the second stage would address management of the Strait of Hormuz. The third stage reserves discussion of nuclear issues, which Iran will not address until the first two stages are settled.

title: [开源] Patch Courier： Email 进来， Codex 在你的 Mac 上干活
content: Patch Courier is a macOS daemon that receives emails from trusted senders, maps them to local Codex threads, and performs tasks with the local Codex server. It handles approvals, supplemental info, and results via email, storing state in SQLite and passwords in Keychain. The tool avoids cloud agents to keep code, credentials, and policies local, and leverages email for asynchronous approval and audit trails. Version 0.2 adds restart recovery, duplicate suppression, mailbox replay deduplication, and persistent failure handling. It remains a prototype requiring macOS, Xcode CLT, and the Codex CLI; contributions and feedback are welcome.

title: [内测邀请] 做了个临时文件分享工具，无需注册登录，完全免费，最大支持 2GB 文件分享，不支持 Safari
content: A beta file‑sharing tool allows temporary uploads up to 2 GB without registration. Each file receives a download link that expires after up to 7 days. The service is purely transient—no storage history or space limits—and uses encryption. It runs on a foreign server, so domestic download speeds are of concern. Users are invited to test upload speed, stability, and download experience, and to note any missing features. The tool is hosted at <https://aura-share-beta.vercel.app/>.

title: DeepSeek V4 成 OpenClaw 默认模型
content: OpenClaw’s latest release integrates DeepSeek V4 as its default model, with V4 Flash enabled and a Pro version added. The update corrects multi‑turn tool‑call issues, improving stability for long‑chain tasks. It introduces a Google Meet plugin for real‑time voice calls and meeting notes, enhances lightweight plugin and model architectures, and removes legacy SDK paths while adding compatibility management. These changes shift OpenClaw from a chat product toward a workflow system.

title: 人类马拉松正式突破 2 小时
content: In the London Marathon men's elite race, Sebastian Sauvelook past Koelem Leka to finish in 1:59:30, becoming the first runner to complete a full marathon in under two hours and setting a new world record. Koelem Leka also broke the two‑hour barrier with 1:59:41, the fastest debut win ever. Jacob Kiprimor finished 2:00:28, improving on the previous world record. The event was widely reported as a historic milestone in marathon running.
